docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-11-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHOBER, CHARLES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-14-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUAN, BRADLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCHOBER, CHARLES $862.50 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,002.50, THE COURT IS CONCERNED THAT DEFENDANT CASHED THE DEPOSIT CHECK BEFORE THE PARTIES HAD REACHED A FINAL AGREEMENT, BUT ALSO NOTE THAT PLAINTIFF SIGNED A MODIFIED VERSION OF THE LEASE. THE COURT CONCLUDES THAT THE PARTIES SHALL SHARE RESPONSIBILITY FOR THE RESULTING ISSUES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-14-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-14-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,725.00 FILED BY QUAN, BRADLEY AS TO DEFENDANT SCHOBER, CHARLES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-2010 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
